name: Portfolio â€” Service / Start project form (webhook â†’ Sheets + email)

parameters.content:
## Setup (one-time)
1. **Spreadsheet**: Create tab **Service** with row 1 headers: `Timestamp`, `Name`, `Email`, `Phone`, `Services`, `Budget`, `Message`, `Source` (matches Next.js `start-project` route).
2. **Google Sheets node**: Set Document ID to your sheet; connect OAuth2; open node to refresh column mapping if n8n asks.
3. **SMTP**: Match portfolio `.env` SMTP settings; adjust `smtpFrom` in Code if needed.
4. **Activate** â†’ copy Production Webhook URL â†’ `NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVICE_WEBHOOK_URL` (static) or use `/api/start-project` on Netlify.

**Payload**: `{ name, email, phone, services[], budget, message?, source }` â€” `source` is `start-project-form` from the site.
